prompt_text: Rosa has a small red kite. She walks to the yard and sees a soft wind. Rosa runs fast and lets the kite go up. The kite moves high in the sky. Rosa smiles, sits on the grass, and drinks water. She feels happy because her kite flies well today.

prompt_text: Lena wakes up early. She puts on her hat and goes to the garden. Lena sees a small seed in a cup. She digs a hole, plants the seed, and gives it water. The sun feels warm. Lena waits each day. Soon, a leaf comes out. Lena smiles at it.
